purpose: Defines an enumeration of different wave patterns used in a game or animation, each with specific path coordinates and timing parameters for enemy movement.

parameters.name: waveSegments
parameters.description: The number of segments in the wave path.

parameters.name: totalFrames
parameters.description: The total number of frames for the wave animation.

return_value.description: Constructor for the WaveType enum, initializing wave path coordinates.

parameters.name: totalFrames
parameters.description: The total number of frames for calculating coordinates.

parameters.name: ap0
parameters.description: Array of doubles representing the first anchor point.

parameters.name: cp1
parameters.description: Array of doubles representing the first control point.

parameters.name: cp2
parameters.description: Array of doubles representing the second control point.

parameters.name: ap3
parameters.description: Array of doubles representing the second anchor point.

return_value.description: A list of WaveCoordinate objects representing the calculated path coordinates.
